latin: Errorem ingentem feci. hoc statim scivi. ubi oculos aperui et vidi quid fecissem, solum dicere potui: errorem ingentem feci.

questions.prompt: When did the speaker realize the mistake?
How does the speaker describe the mistake?

translation: I've made a huge mistake. I knew this immediately. When I opened my eyes and saw what I had done, I could only say: I've made a huge mistake.
